title: Interstellar
summary: A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity while exploring love, sacrifice, and time.

title: Memento
summary: A man with short-term memory loss investigates his wife's murder using notes and tattoos in a nonlinear narrative.

title: KGF
summary: A poor young man rises through the violent gold mafia world seeking power, respect, and destiny.

title: Inception
summary: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal and plant ideas inside people's minds. The story explores reality, dreams, guilt, memory, subconscious conflict, deception, and layered narratives.

title: The Prestige
summary: Two rival magicians become obsessed with outperforming each other, leading to sacrifice, deception, obsession, and tragedy.

title: Joker
summary: A lonely and mentally troubled man is pushed to society's edge and transforms into a symbol of chaos and rebellion.

title: The Matrix
summary: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and becomes humanity's hope in a war against intelligent machines.

title: Ex Machina
summary: A programmer evaluates a highly advanced AI and becomes trapped in a dangerous game of manipulation, consciousness, and identity.
